name: 6.5'x10' Rectangular Scalloped Outdoor Patio Market Umbrella Off-White with Black Pole - Threshold™
description:
Enjoy outdoor lounging in the shade with this Rectangular Scalloped Outdoor Patio Market Umbrella Linen with Black Pole from Threshold™. This outdoor umbrella features a scalloped design on the edging for a nice decorative look. It comes with a rectangular linen fabric canopy set on rust-resistant black steel frame for lasting outdoor use. Plus, it's equipped with a crank lift system that makes it easy to raise and lower the canopy, along with a tilt adjustment for selecting the right angle of protection from the sun.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
